✅ DURABLE 4-STAINLESS STEEL BLADES-The four-leaf stainless-steel blades in blenders for smoothies are designed for power and precision. ✅ 4 SPEED, & PULSE CONTROL-Choose between four speeds for soft or hard ingredients, or the pulse function for quick bursts of power from soup blender. Get total control over texture and consistency with our smoothy maker blender. Blend your way with intuitive knob-based operation of ice blender.
